uplink.description: Regular position uplink (live fix, in trip)
Synthetic position uplink (live fix, not in trip, southern/eastern hemisphere)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds input; expected.data derived via the ORACLE method by running reference/upstream-codec.js and re-shaping to the normalized vocabulary. Status byte 44 = inTrip 0, fixFailed 0, batteryCode 0x2C; heading byte 128; temp byte 50 -> 25 C.

uplink.description: Synthetic position uplink (fix failed -> cached coordinates, no live position)
uplink._note: Synthetic input with status byte 0xCA (inTrip 1, fixFailed 1, batteryCode 10); coordinates and temp derived via the ORACLE method from reference/upstream-codec.js. fixFailed suppresses position.* and surfaces cached coordinates with a warning.

uplink.description: Version-info frame carries no normalized measurement

uplink._note: Synthetic short-payload input to exercise the length guard.
